## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run api:check`
- [ ] `npm run smoke:mvp-scope`
- [ ] Other:

## Public-Repo Safety

- [ ] No real citizen data, private evidence, secrets, OTPs, tokens, or production incident details.
- [ ] No unapproved official marks, public-figure likenesses, third-party photos, or private demo assets.
- [ ] Jurisdiction data is marked as sample/template data unless its source and license are documented.
- [ ] User-facing changes were checked for clear copy, accessibility, and role-appropriate behavior.
